Age Distribution

Top Team Average PPR

Average uses each team's top 20 projected PPR values. Invalid team labels are excluded.

Upside is the source ceiling score; Downside is the source miss-risk score. Higher numbers mean more of that trait. Auction values assume 12 teams, $200 budgets, superflex, PPR, and TE premium. Bid+ means an analyst target signal; Bid++ means a stronger signal such as Harmon SUPER BUY or multiple target signals. Hover or click a Bid marker for the source.

Filtered Top Fpts

Filtered Position Mix

Waldman mode keeps workbook tier colors. Kyle mode uses the supplied rankings and tier shading. Harmon mode uses WR-only Reception Perception ranks with action and market tags.

Best Team Builder

Builds a 25-player roster using tier-banded bid values plus the selected premium. Starters use 1 QB, 1 RB, 1 WR, 1 TE, 5 Flex, and 1 Superflex.

Fast Auction Mock

:10

Click a team header or summary to inspect that roster. Bot profiles can be changed in Team Summary. The board scrolls horizontally so you can compare every team at once.
